channel.title: NAAO Miller, M Kapadia, MA Kirksey, M Sandhu, D Jannat-Khah, T Bui, KK Boyle, A Krez, L Russell, J O'Neill, EM Stein, MW Henry, VC Antao, DE Padgett | PlatCOVID

item.title: Clinical Experience with COVID-19 at a Specialty Orthopedic Hospital Converted to a Pandemic Overflow Field Hospital.
